nodes.label: Entropy Collapse
nodes.rationale: Shaped reward + Transformer causes policy to collapse to zero entropy mid-training, leading to vanishing PPO gradients. Fixed by disabling shaped reward (V4.9) or increasing entropy_coef to 0.05+.

nodes.label: Shaped Reward Misdirection
nodes.rationale: Intermediate shaped reward can dominate terminal speedup, causing the agent to optimize static heuristics (parallelism, vectorizability) rather than actual execution time. The no-shaped-reward ablation outperformed all shaped-reward variants.

nodes.label: Lustre Soft File Quota
nodes.rationale: /scratch directory has a soft limit of 500K files and a hard limit of 1M files. Training and evals consume files quickly, requiring periodic quota checks using lfs quota.
